examples: It is language intended not to reveal but to conceal, not to communicate but to obfuscate.
Remember that every parameter may be changed, no matter how much you hide or obfuscate it.
Some advice for Autonomy CEO Mike Lynch: You can obfuscate about what is said in a private conversation.
Since then, I do whatever I am able to obfuscate my identity for simple security.
If he did not, then why did he obfuscate to United Nations weapons inspectors?
